observations.description: Sequential observations drawn one at a time, where 'g' denotes a good item and 'b' denotes a defective item.

p0.description: Proportion of defective items under the null hypothesis H0.

p1.description: Proportion of defective items under the alternative hypothesis H1.

alpha.description: Probability of rejecting H0 when it is true (Type I error probability).

beta.description: Probability of accepting H0 when H1 is true (Type II error probability).
